data.content:
Implementation review:
- All 6 acceptance criteria satisfied (package layout, K-01 sizes, TAXONOMY identifiers, build/test, CLI surface unchanged, trust-boundary doc comments).
- bash scripts/check_file_sizes.sh exits 0.
- golangci-lint run reports zero findings (down from 35 lll + 0 funlen baseline; the ~31 from the HTML template went to template.html via go:embed).
- go test ./... passes; tests moved to live in the package whose internals they exercise (internal/store/store_test.go, internal/web/server_test.go, internal/cli/cli_test.go).
- K-04 deferred renames landed: (*store) -> store.Store; webServer.render -> web.Server.writePage. TAXONOMY.md review queue updated.
- Public CLI surface verified by manually running the binary with --help, init, set, list, render, recipient add, delete, provision.
- 6 commits, one per package extraction plus a TAXONOMY refresh.
